sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, eventDate DateTime, eventValue Int32) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT id, eventValue, toRelativeMonthNum(eventDate) AS monthsPassed FROM test_dates WHERE eventValue IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, eventValue, (x -> toRelativeMonthNum(toDate(eventDate))) AS monthsPassed FROM test_dates WHERE eventValue < 150;
SELECT id, eventValue, (x -> toRelativeMonthNum(toDateTime(x))) AS monthsPassed FROM (SELECT eventDate FROM test_dates WHERE eventValue IS NOT NULL) AS sub;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt, (x -> toRelativeMonthNum(toDateTime(eventDate))) FROM test_dates GROUP BY eventValue HAVING cnt > 1;
SELECT id, (x -> toRelativeMonthNum(toDate(eventDate))) AS monthsPassed, eventValue FROM test_dates ORDER BY monthsPassed DESC;

SELECT t1.id, t1.eventValue, t2.eventValue as otherValue FROM test_dates t1 JOIN test_dates t2 ON toRelativeMonthNum(t1.eventDate) = (x -> toRelativeMonthNum(t2.eventDate)) WHERE t1.eventValue IS NOT NULL;
SELECT AVG(eventValue) AS avgValue FROM (SELECT eventValue, (x -> toRelativeMonthNum(toDate(eventDate))) AS monthsPassed FROM test_dates WHERE eventValue IS NOT NULL HAVING monthsPassed < 12) AS sub;
